decisions.title: Prioritize Families feature GA vs Beta extension
decisions.context: DES-113 surfaced ULA customer feedback on Family Visualization, DOC-16 and ENG-9499 are building docs, ENG-9556 labels it Beta. Need to decide: commit to GA timeline or extend Beta for more feedback cycles.

arguments.for: Customer feedback is actionable, docs in progress, signals show momentum toward stabilization
arguments.against: Beta label suggests feature incomplete; rushing GA risks quality issues that damage trust

decisions.title: Commit resources to MCP/Agent incident response vs core product velocity
decisions.context: ENG-9296 (Internal MCP server MVP) and ENG-9292 (Agent-assisted incident response POC) represent new AI/automation direction. Competes with core Canvas, Python Rules, Explore V2 roadmap bandwidth.

arguments.for: MCP/Agent aligns with 'Build the Moat'—differentiated AI-driven workflows. Early POCs can unlock Ask SIFT v2 capabilities.
arguments.against: Team capacity finite; diverting from Nail the Core risks slowing Decisions Captured Per Customer growth

decisions.title: Standardize IdP integration approach for all enterprise customers
decisions.context: ENG-8081 (TEC), ENG-8157 (Astrolab), ENG-9613 (onboarding tool), ENG-9614 (metrics/alerts) show ad-hoc IdP work. Need architectural decision: per-customer custom vs standardized SSO framework.
decisions.blockedBy: Lack of clarity on enterprise customer SSO requirements matrix; security team audit pending

arguments.for: Standardization scales Embed Deeper pillar; reduces maintenance burden, accelerates onboarding
arguments.against: Custom integrations may be necessary for high-value customers with unique identity stacks

decisions.title: Feature flag rollout strategy: event tracking vs session replay priority
decisions.context: ENG-9125 (Event Feature Flagged Experiences), ENG-9124 (Session Replay), ENG-9122 (Discovery prototypes) in flight. Must decide: ship event tracking first for faster iteration or wait for session replay for richer debugging.

arguments.for: Event tracking ships faster, unblocks A/B testing for Canvas/Explore V2 features sooner
arguments.against: Session replay provides deeper signal for complex UX decisions; waiting delivers better long-term insights

decisions.title: Sift CLI v0.1.0 release scope: MVP now vs expanded features
decisions.context: ENG-9569 signals CLI v0.1.0 imminent. Decision: ship minimal viable CLI for early adopters or expand scope to include Python Rules authoring, bulk operations.

arguments.for: MVP unblocks power users immediately; establishes feedback loop for v0.2 prioritization
arguments.against: Narrow feature set may disappoint expectations; risks low adoption if missing key workflows

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy coordination week: IdP integrations, Families feedback synthesis, CLI release planning consuming most meeting time. Focus blocks insufficient for deep product strategy work.
alerts: 3 decisions pending past original target dates (IdP standardization blocking customer onboarding)
Eng team context-switching between 9 active Linear projects; fragmentation risk to velocity
No dedicated time blocked for 2026 H2 strategy planning (due April 15); calendar fully booked
